title: crotalaria tabularis
intro: Crotalaria tabularis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, known for its clusters of small, yellow or yellow-white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in India and Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria tabularis include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in modern medicine.
